query:
SELECT id as "id!: String" FROM blocks b
           WHERE b.block_type = 'page'
             AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM block_properties p
                 WHERE p.block_id = b.id AND p.key = 'space'
             )
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM block_properties p
                 WHERE p.block_id = b.id
                   AND p.key = 'is_space'
                   AND p.value_text = 'true'
             )
